scripts.emulators: npm run build --workspace=backend/functions && npx firebase emulators:start
scripts.emulators:functions: npm run build --workspace=backend/functions && npx firebase emulators:start --only functions
scripts.deploy:rules:firestore: unset GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS; npx --yes --package=firebase-tools@15.22.4 firebase deploy --only firestore:rules --project serviceverse-dev-fa38e
